title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 12–13, this part follows Unknown person #13, Usopp, Unknown person #14, Children, Brook as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: it must've hurt real bad... sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You see, my dream is to be a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What is with ALL of this commotion?!
